text.title: Remote Workshop Toolkit Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying remote-workshop-toolkit. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.symptom: 30–50% of attendees never speak, cameras off, no chat.
antipattern.root-cause: No structure to compensate for lack of shared room.
antipattern.fix: Switch to 1-2-4-All; anonymous-sticky for first round; address camera policy mid-session if needed.

antipattern.symptom: 5 people in room share one laptop, 4 remote on tiles. Room dominates.
antipattern.fix: Mandate one-laptop-per-person; otherwise run fully remote.

antipattern.symptom: Too many stickies, no frame structure; orientation lost after 30 min.
antipattern.fix: Pause; refactor canvas into ≤7 frames; vote to compress.
Mandate four roles + read-out template; reject 'go discuss'.
